calls.query:
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"pwd && wc -l AGENTS.md .github/prompts/predict.md && sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500222 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor && find data/cases/scotus/73500222 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500222 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor; find data/cases/scotus/73500222 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/snapshots/2026-07-18.json data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/context.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yam

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '421,900p' data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '901,1220p' data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,80p' data/cases/scotus/73500222/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|case law|citation|docket|opinion/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(hits);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n '^#{1,6} |Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|Eighth|relist|CVSG|2024 Term|2023 Term|paid|IFP' metrics/statpack.md | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,190p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'salience|band' metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") or has(\"Term\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git status --short && date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z && echo output-path-clear","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",

+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260718T064904Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-18T07:16:42Z",
+  "input_snapshot": "d

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/tooling.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73500222/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && git status --short --untracked-files=all | sed -n '1,120p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);
